summary: Frontend testing of Footer (form, orari, Google Maps) and ScrollReveal animations. All 8 requested features verified passing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All footer features verified: form fields (nome, telefono, email, messaggio) fillable, submit does e.preventDefault (no errors), orari show Lun-Ven/Sab/Dom with Chiuso in red (.chiuso class), Google Maps iframe present with correct coords (45.3881368,10.9054592), footer bg rgb(22,33,43)=#16212B, copyright 2026 visible. ScrollReveal: 19 reveal elements, 10 visible after scroll. All previous sections (Hero, Steps, Stats, Works) still working.
